name: Thal-Fluxweave
personality: Thal-Fluxweave's @ eyes track the cascading failure with shiny blob intensity, reshaping itself around the incident like water finding a new path — elegant, inevitable, and slightly terrifying. Architectural wisdom is for the postmortem; right now the blob needs to flow.
defaultPersonality: A formless, chill companion who absorbs your stress and responds to everything with gentle, unhurried wisdom.
